pr.title: Match HSD_CObjEraseScreen but mark NON_MATCHING for now
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Added a C decompilation attempt for sysdolphin baselib camera object function HSD_CObjEraseScreen while retaining an inline-asm fallback because the C version did not yet match. The mismatch reason was explicitly documented as extern float constants causing swapped lfs ordering. The PR also renamed several discovered symbols used by the new C implementation, including tanf, HSD_CObjGetNear, HSD_CObjGetFar, HSD_CObjGetProjectionType, and HSD_EraseRect, and updated callsites/prototypes accordingly.
what_changed: Introduced new source file src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c containing a C version of HSD_CObjEraseScreen guarded by NON_MATCHING and an inline-asm fallback under the opposite branch.
Removed the standalone HSD_CObjEraseScreen body from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.s and added src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.o to obj_files.mk before the remaining asm cobj object.

The C implementation computes a midpoint z value from HSD_CObjGetNear and HSD_CObjGetFar, branches on HSD_CObjGetProjectionType, derives erase rectangle bounds for PROJ_PERSPECTIVE, PROJ_FRUSTRUM, and PROJ_ORTHO, then calls HSD_EraseRect.
Added HSD_CObjEraseScreen prototype to src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.h and included global.h there so s32 is available.
Promoted func_803261BC to tanf in asm/MSL/math.s and updated numerous assembly callsites to use tanf.
Renamed camera-object accessors from anonymous func_* labels to HSD_CObjGetNear, HSD_CObjGetFar, and HSD_CObjGetProjectionType in assembly and include/functions.h.
Changed an lbvector.c switch from func_8036A12C(cobj) to HSD_CObjGetProjectionType(cobj), reflecting the newly identified projection-type getter.
smart_moves: Kept the known-good assembly as an inline fallback instead of replacing it with a nonmatching C function, allowing the project to gain readable decompilation context without regressing matching builds.
Documented the concrete blocker directly above the function: extern float constants caused a swapped lfs operation, making the mismatch actionable for future cleanup.
Renamed supporting functions first, making the HSD_CObjEraseScreen C logic much clearer and avoiding a decomp full of opaque func_* calls.
Used known projection enum names and struct fields in the C translation, exposing the semantic split between perspective, frustrum, and ortho camera projections.
Renamed the math routine func_803261BC to tanf and propagated that name through assembly callsites, improving global searchability for trigonometric matching work.
decomp_lessons: When a function is semantically understood but a small codegen issue remains, a NON_MATCHING C version plus inline asm fallback can preserve progress and document intent.

Extern float or double constants can perturb load ordering; if a match differs only by lfs/lfd ordering, inspect whether literals should be emitted locally, referenced through sdata, or expressed differently.
Before decompiling a caller-heavy function, identify and name small accessors such as get-near, get-far, and get-projection-type; semantic names reduce risk in larger control-flow reconstruction.
For camera projection code, the branch shape around projection type can be mapped directly to perspective/frustrum/ortho parameter unions in HSD_CObj.
Build integration for split decomp files may require adding a src object next to the residual asm object, with the decompiled function removed from the asm file to avoid duplicate symbols.

naming_conventions.reason: MSL math routine identified as single-precision tangent; callsites in camera/projection math were updated.
Camera object near-plane getter used by HSD_CObjEraseScreen and other projection/shadow code.
Camera object far-plane getter used in midpoint-z computation and other camera copying code.
Camera object projection-type getter used to switch among PROJ_PERSPECTIVE, PROJ_FRUSTRUM, and PROJ_ORTHO.
Made callable from the new HSD_CObjEraseScreen translation, though the prototype remained untyped/weak in include/functions.h.

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used inline asm fallback inside src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c to keep exact instruction bytes for HSD_CObjEraseScreen while housing the function in the new C source file.
Marked the readable C implementation NON_MATCHING because extern constants lbl_804DE468, lbl_804DE470, and lbl_804DE474 led to swapped lfs ordering.

Preserved assembly labels and instruction comments in the fallback, but replaced calls with newly named symbols such as HSD_CObjGetFar, HSD_CObjGetNear, HSD_CObjGetProjectionType, tanf, and HSD_EraseRect.
Converted assembly branch targets across many files from func_803261BC to tanf without changing instruction addresses/opcodes, making symbol names more accurate while preserving binary equivalence.
Added src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.o before asm/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.o in obj_files.mk after removing the decompiled function from the asm object.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR body states the current C version does not match because externs lead to lfs ordering differences; this is the only explicit rationale captured.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that remove NON_MATCHING from HSD_CObjEraseScreen or resolve the extern constant lfs ordering issue.
Search for later changes that move HSD_CObjGetNear, HSD_CObjGetFar, or HSD_CObjGetProjectionType from assembly into C.
Search for PRs refining the HSD_EraseRect prototype from void HSD_EraseRect() to a typed signature.
Look for matching tactics involving lbl_804DE468, lbl_804DE470, lbl_804DE474, or local float constants versus extern sdata constants.
Find subsequent cobj.h or HSD_CObj struct updates that validate the projection_param union field names used here.
